behaviour_notes: Baseline A2C. Steady convergence, low variance.
Higher LR. Faster but slightly noisier learning.
Longer n_steps. Reduces bias in advantage estimates.
High entropy. More exploration, slower exploitation.
Zero entropy. Deterministic, risk of premature convergence.
Very long n_steps (20). Low-bias returns, high variance.
High vf_coef. Stronger value function signal.
Lower gamma + reduced vf_coef. Less future credit.
